edges.dual_deformation: Higgsing of mirror nodes to Cartan subgroup

edges.algorithm_steps: Higgsing each U(k) node to Cartan subgroup

Step 1: The quiver is chopped into its basic QFT blocks. Step 2: Each QFT block is dualized via the basic duality moves. Step 3: The dualized blocks are glued together via the N=2 chiral/planar fusion to identity.
decomposition into fundamental blocks, dualization, gluing via identity walls
